# format: html5-dom-v2

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  <!doctype html>
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="title" attrs=[]
        "Daily Wire"
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="header" attrs=[]
        element ns=html local="h1" attrs=[]
          "Daily Wire"
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="main" attrs=[]
        "\n"
        element ns=html local="section" attrs=[]
          element ns=html local="h2" attrs=[]
            "Top stories"
          element ns=html local="ul" attrs=[]
            element ns=html local="li" attrs=[]
              "Markets rise"
            element ns=html local="li" attrs=[]
              "New satellite launch"
        "\n"
        element ns=html local="section" attrs=[]
          element ns=html local="h2" attrs=[]
            "World"
          element ns=html local="p" attrs=[]
            "Regional updates continue."
        "\n"
      "\n"
